items.description: Star oblien / openship Self-hosted deployment platform

Sponsor Star diegosouzapw / OmniRoute Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi K3, GLM, DeepSeek. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, multimodal, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors.

Sponsor Star msitarzewski / agency-agents A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
Star Robbyant / lingbot-map A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data

Sponsor Star tirth8205 / code-review-graph Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
Star jamiepine / voicebox The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
Star KnockOutEZ / wigolo The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta.
Sponsor Star rohitg00 / ai-engineering-from-scratch Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

Star microsoft / Ontology-Playground Free, open-source web app for learning about ontologies and Microsoft Fabric IQ. Explore a catalogue of pre-built ontologies, design your own visually, export as RDF/XML, and share interactive diagrams. Zero backend, fully static.
Sponsor Star tokio-rs / topcoat A batteries-included framework for building web apps
Star MoonshotAI / kimi-cli Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.
Star handy-computer / transcribe.cpp ggml speech-to-text inference for 16+ model families
Star kvcache-ai / ktransformers A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations
Sponsor Star topoteretes / cognee Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.
Star moonshine-ai / moonshine Very low latency speech to text, intent recognition, and text to speech, for building voice agents and interfaces
Star 1jehuang / jcode The most intelligent agent harness for code
Star every-app / open-seo Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs
Star AstrBotDevs / AstrBot AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨
Star PrefectHQ / fastmcp 🚀 The fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.
